title: PromptVariant
description: A systematically varied version of a prompt instance (agency/capabilities/prompt/ontology.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — prompt-dossier wave). VARIANT_OF the parent PromptInstance; variant_kind classifies the transformation applied.

parent_instance.description: Node ID of the PromptInstance this variant derives from.

variant_kind.description: Type of transformation applied to produce this variant.
